_comment: Default JACC policy for ConfSpeakerHub. Hot-reloaded from disk at runtime — point JHG_POLICY_FILE at a writable copy of this file and edit it during the demo to watch the row set change with no redeploy. Predicate language: 4 operators (intersects, contains, ==, !=) plus the && AND-join, over speaker.* and event.* paths.

rules.subject: role:SPEAKER
rules.predicate: speaker.languages intersects event.languages && speaker.tracks intersects event.tracks
